name_cn:
🌟Double Handle Handbag
Featuring elegant and simple design with distinctive noble patent leather➕imported nylon fabric. Classic logo on the front with a gold triangle emblem. Long handles for hand or shoulder carry. Features three compartments to meet exquisite storage needs.
Size: 30×17.5×9cm
Style No.: 1BB115
